raw_extraction.innovation: Autoregressive transformer modeling of joint text-image streams via a two-stage process: (1) discrete VAE for image compression into 32x32 grid of 8192-codebook tokens, (2) single-stream autoregressive transformer trained on concatenated text+image tokens.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 250 million text-image pairs collected from the internet (including Conceptual Captions, filtered subset of YFCC100M, excluding MS-COCO)
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot text-to-image generation, image-to-image translation, concept combination, visual scene creation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Zero-shot text-to-image synthesis without task-specific supervision or auxiliary losses
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Joint autoregressive modeling of text and image tokens via discrete VAE + next-token prediction
raw_extraction.extension: Per-resblock gradient scaling to mitigate underflow in mixed-precision training

raw_extraction.innovation: Combines a **discrete Variational Autoencoder (dVAE)** for image compression with a **Transformer-based autoregressive model** for generating image tokens, enabling zero-shot text-to-image synthesis without fine-tuning.
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot text-to-image generation, image-to-image translation, combinatorial generalization (e.g., rendering novel objects like 'a hedgehog wearing a christmas sweater walking a dog')
raw_extraction.research_problem: Zero-shot text-to-image generation using large-scale unsupervised learning
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Discrete Variational Autoencoder (dVAE) reconstruction + Transformer-based autoregressive modeling
raw_extraction.extension: Discrete latent space enables efficient training of a Transformer on compressed image tokens while preserving high-resolution output.
